name: create-ai-agents-docs
description: Scaffold AI agent-friendly documentation in any repository

scripts.build: npm run test && npm run lint && npm run format:check
scripts.docs:preview: npm run docs:build && npx serve docs/dist
scripts.format: prettier --write lib/ bin/ test/ docs/build.mjs docs/template.html '*.md' eslint.config.js package.json
scripts.format:check: prettier --check lib/ bin/ test/ docs/build.mjs docs/template.html '*.md' eslint.config.js package.json

author: Bence A. Toth
